differentials.name: Superficial inguinal nodes Location:   subcutis anterior to inguinal ligament along femoral vein + saphenous vein
differentials.raw: Superficial inguinal nodes Location:   subcutis anterior to inguinal ligament along femoral vein + saphenous vein

context: accompany each visceral branch of internal iliac artery Location:   at junction between internal + external iliac nodes Location:   central location of presacral space External Iliac Nodes Location:   lateral relative to external iliac artery) Location:   between external iliac artery + vein) Location:   medial + posterior to external iliac vein) Inguinal nodes demarcated from external iliac nodes by inguinal ligament Saphenofemoral junction node = sentinel node Location:   along common femoral artery + vein
